TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Drita_Pelingu, title = Drita_Pelingu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Drita_Pelingu} }

S.FORM: == Drita Pelingu == kawas tay 1926, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 12, Drita Pelingu, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 19954,Drita Pelingu tmasot pqwasan biru beh nana mupulenesng(Nana Mbretneshe). 1926 kawas 12 byacing 3 ryax,Drita Pelingu htagan beh sa a'paniya polola. hiya yaba ga,wal mqbaq blaq balay pincbaq.tmasot pqwasan biru beh tu'ci ru saysalonici. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

== Drita Pelingu == kawas tay 1926, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 12, Drita Pelingu, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 19954,Drita Pelingu tmasot pqwasan biru beh nana mupulenesng(Nana Mbretneshe). 1926 kawas 12 byacing 3 ryax,Drita Pelingu htagan beh sa a'paniya polola. hiya yaba ga,wal mqbaq blaq balay pincbaq.tmasot pqwasan biru beh tu'ci ru saysalonici. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *rita peliŋu == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *rita peliŋu, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~ɕ taj *****,*rita peliŋu tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru βeħ nana mupulenes~ɕŋ(nana mβretnes~ɕħe). **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,*rita peliŋu ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa aʔpanija polola. ħija jaβa ɣa,wal mqβaq βlaq βalaj pinʦ~ʨβaq.tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru βeħ tuʔʦ~ʨi ru s~ɕajs~ɕaloniʦ~ʨi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
